canonical_name: HIMCARE - Himachal Pradesh Health Care Scheme

local_names.hi: हिमकेयर - हिमाचल प्रदेश स्वास्थ्य सेवा योजना
local_names.bn: হিমকেয়ার - হিমাচল প্রদেশ স্বাস্থ্য সেবা যোজনা
local_names.mr: हिमकेअर - हिमाचल प्रदेश आरोग्य सेवा योजना
local_names.gu: હિમકેર - હિમાચલ પ્રદેશ આરોગ્ય સેવા યોજના
local_names.kn: ಹಿಮ್‌ಕೇರ್ - ಹಿಮಾಚಲ ಪ್ರದೇಶ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸೇವಾ ಯೋಜನೆ
local_names.ml: ഹിംകെയർ - ഹിമാചൽ പ്രദേശ് ആരോഗ്യ സേവന പദ്ധതി
local_names.pa: ਹਿਮਕੇਅਰ - ਹਿਮਾਚਲ ਪ੍ਰਦੇਸ਼ ਸਿਹਤ ਸੇਵਾ ਯੋਜਨਾ
local_names.or: ହିମକେୟାର - ହିମାଚଳ ପ୍ରଦେଶ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ସେବା ଯୋଜନା

income_thresholds.description: Multi-tier premium: BPL families FREE; registered street vendors FREE; senior citizens 70+ FREE; widows FREE; disabled persons FREE; others pay Rs 365/year (1 member), Rs 565/year (2-3 members), or Rs 1,000/year (4+ members).
income_thresholds.source: HP State Government / HIMCARE HPSBYS Portal

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Himachal Pradesh are eligible
Families covered under CGHS are excluded
Enrollment is open only during quarterly windows (Jan-Mar, Apr-Jun, Jul-Sep, Oct-Dec). Applications outside the window may need to wait for the next quarter.
Non-BPL families must pay annual premium (Rs 365-1000 based on family size). Coverage does not activate until premium is paid.

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as per ration card or Aadhaar-linked family unit. All listed members covered. Premium tier based on family size: 1 member Rs 365, 2-3 members Rs 565, 4+ members Rs 1,000 per year. BPL/vendor/senior 70+/widow/disabled: free.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: HP Ration Card / BPL Certificate
required_documents.local_name_hi: हिमाचल राशन कार्ड / BPL प्रमाण पत्र
required_documents.notes: BPL certificate required for free tier. Non-BPL families can enroll by paying premium.

required_documents.name: Himachal Pradesh Residence Proof
required_documents.notes: Must prove residency in Himachal Pradesh

required_documents.name: Street Vendor Certificate (for free tier)
required_documents.notes: Required for registered street vendors to claim free enrollment

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Lok Mitra Kendra)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility and enrollment window at hpsbys.in or call 0177-2629-802
Step 2: Note: Enrollment is quarterly (Jan-Mar, Apr-Jun, Jul-Sep, Oct-Dec). Apply during open window.
Step 3: Visit nearest CSC or register online at hpsbys.in with Aadhaar and HP residence proof
Step 4: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 5: For BPL/vendor/senior 70+/widow/disabled: no payment needed. For others: pay premium (Rs 365/565/1000 based on family size)
Step 6: HIMCARE card generated after verification
Step 7: Card activates 30 days after enrollment (waiting period). Present at empanelled hospital for cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh.
description_for_embedding: HIMCARE is Himachal Pradesh's state health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh per family per year. Unique multi-tier premium structure: BPL families, registered street vendors, senior citizens 70+, widows, and disabled persons get completely free enrollment. Other families pay a very low annual premium based on family size: Rs 365 (1 member), Rs 565 (2-3 members), or Rs 1,000 (4+ members). Enrollment is quarterly — open during Jan-Mar, Apr-Jun, Jul-Sep, Oct-Dec windows. 30-day waiting period after enrollment. Covers hospitalization and surgery at empanelled hospitals. Enrollment via hpsbys.in or CSC. Helpline 0177-2629-802.
